programme.title: Xplash Ep107
programme.desc: Xplash brings you spectacular water-related action from around the globe. Today we'll catch some big-air freestyle kitesurfing in the Canary Islands, bodysurf giant waves in Ireland, go whitewater kayaking in Iceland and check out Hydro Flight at the Poseidon Games in Australia.

programme.title: Shark Dive TV Ep109: Whale Sharks, Feeding Frenzies, and Great White Sharks.
programme.desc: Shark Dive TV studies Whale Sharks kept in a giant tank and then takes a Deeper Dive by explaining shark hearing, shark feeding frenzies and Great White Sharks.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Ep107
programme.desc: Liquid Edge highlights the kiteboarding doc With A Kite; profiles one of surfing’s greatest legends, Tom Carroll; checks out the O’Neill Coldwater Classic in Canada; and unveils Sligo, Ireland…an extreme surf sweet spot. Also featured is female big wave surfer, Maya Gabriel; an inside look at Pipeline from The Essence of Surfing; and wakeboarding innovator Dean Lavelle gives us his view on wakeboarding today.

programme.title: The Great Barrier Reef: World's most amazing coral reef
programme.desc: This expedition to the Great Barrier Reef is designed to study the health and resilience of one of the world’s most amazing coral reefs. The expedition’s goal is to collect data about the world's most remote reefs and build a picture of how reefs are faring in today's changing climate.

programme.title: Extinction Soup
programme.desc: Extinction Soup is a documentary about the ground-breaking efforts to stop the international trade of shark fins. The story follows filmmaker Philip Waller on his quest to document the efforts of conservationist Stefanie Brendl, founder of Shark Allies, as she fights to educate lawmakers and helps pass legislation that will ban the trade of fins and the consumption of shark fin soup - the driving force behind the slaughter of millions of sharks every year.

programme.title: Liquid Edge Minisodes - Canyoning, Jet Ski Free Ride, and Feeding Stingrays
programme.desc: The Deap Canyoning Team defies logic as they leap from high cliffs into deep canyon pools. This realatively new extreme sport called Canyoning, is breathtaking and spectacular viewing!

programme.title: Xplash Ep107

programme.title: Absinthe Films Presents: More
programme.desc: Absinthe raises the bar again. 'More' ushers in a new era of urban riding, deep powder, massive jumps, and the groundbreaking ‘Human Drone’ to bring you closer to snowboarding than ever before.

programme.title: La Quinta Films Presents: Lines
programme.desc: Lines is a documentary about big mountain snowboarding. The dedication. The nerve. The skill. As we follow the Absinthe Films crew for six weeks in Haines, Alaska, we also explore the colorful characters, history and dangers of big mountain riding. Directed by Axel Pauporté and Flora Richard.

programme.title: MICRODOSE Brighton Resort - Episode 01
programme.desc: In our latest MICRODOSE series we aim to explore the most influential resorts and iconic locations in snowboarding history, starting with—that’s right—Brighton Resort in Salt Lake City, Utah. Welcome to Brighton Resort Episode 1 of 5. For many riders young and old, Brighton Resort will forever be the epicenter of the snowboarding world. The plentiful snowfall, terrain parks, lift ops, cat drivers, mechanics, management, cafeteria, cooks, and mountain culture are all first class. Back in the early days, very few ski resorts were willing to take a chance on the newfound “lifestyle sport” of snowboarding, but Brighton took the leap. In doing so, Brighton made all the difference. Within a few years, hundreds of ski areas around the world came to see Brighton’s approach to snowboarding as the gold standard. From the biggest vacation destinations to the smallest trash heaps covered in fake snow, everyone (whether they’ve known it or not) has borrowed from the Brighton playbook. This has made it possible for millions of would-be snowboarders to make their first turns safely in-bounds via rope-tows, chairlifts, and gondola rides. Newbies need not traipse into the backcountry with no snow sense and little skill. For this we have Brighton to thank.

programme.title: Titans of Business

What about the thousands of other business people, that had a better idea or way to make life better, cheaper, and faster? Many of these people are among us and act no differently than we do, but they have a success story to tell and tricks of success to share. These are the people profiled in “Titans of Business”.

programme.desc: In 2014, Mercedes-Benz presented their first Plug-in Hybrid, the S500. When it comes to Bentley, a V8 engine means down-sizing. We took a look at the brand's Flying Spur model with a smaller engine. And: the 6th generation Maserati Quattroporte.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: With its Macan Turbo, Porsche sets the benchmark in the SUV segment. The optional performance package increases the output from 400 to 440 HP. A serious competitor bears the Maserati brand. With the Levante, die Italian carmaker wants to stir up the competitive market for sporty SUVs.

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Supercars

programme.title: Dalua Downhill
programme.desc: This is the journey of Douglas Rodrigues da Silva, aka “Dalua”, who is in search of the Downhill Skateboard world championship. This sport is among the most dangerous in the world where the skaters go downhill reaching speeds over 110 km/h. Over the course of two years, the film follows the Brazilian athlete in his travels around the world revealing that beyond the competition there is a story of determination, passion, pressure and pain. Friendship and rivalry awake some rowdy feelings between the athletes. It is this common bond between them that also what keeps them apart.

programme.title: En Route America
programme.desc: A road trip across the West Coast, following skiers as they explore iconic mountains and chase winter conditions across the United States.

programme.title: En Route Departure
programme.desc: Follow Pep Fujas, Blake Nyman, Anthony Boronowski, Dylan Hood, Eric Pollard, Chris Benchetler and more as they chase storms from a Top Secret Military Mountain Warfare Facility, to the Italian Alps.

programme.title: Falling Angels
programme.desc: Three female BASE jumpers trek deep into the Venezuelan jungle to attempt a historic jump from the world’s highest waterfall, facing extreme terrain, technical challenges, and one of the most dangerous exits in the sport.

programme.title: Gunnie Season
programme.desc: An extreme skiing film featuring some of the world’s top professional skiers pushing their limits on snow and steep terrain.

programme.title: Speed Catamarans GC32 - Preview
programme.desc: Since it was first set up back in 2014, the GC32 Racing Tour has become one of the most sought after for those who enjoy sailing at its finest and fastest. The 2021’s season again proved why the world’s top professional and amateurs love this tour!After a challenging 2020, when the Tour was cancelled, it finally returned better than ever and made 2021 a year to remember. Through the season, the four stops offered nail-biting action in breath taking venues that brought the best out of these dynamic and fast one design foiling catamarans.The level of expectation and the anticipation was extremely high when the owner-driver and commercially-backed professional teams were about to hit again the water and both the organizers and the participants proved that it was worth waiting for the comeback. So let’s remember the most notable moments of what was a fascinating season full of top-level sailing battles in some crystal clear blue waters.

programme.title: Les Voiles de Saint Tropez - Episode 1 - Portrait of Les Voiles De St Tropez
programme.desc: Welcome to the 20th edition of Les Voiles de St. Tropez. The legendary bay of Brigitte Bardot is home one more time to one of the most glamorous regattas in the world. Here, more than 200 Classic and modern yachts sail side by side in the golden Saint Tropez to win this delightful competition.

programme.title: A Day At DIBS
programme.desc: Dubai International Boat Show, the most trusted and established marine industry exhibition in the Middle East. Despite misconceptions claiming luxury yachts to be the main attraction in this event, the DIBS offer a much wider variety of expositions on nautical news, sports and lifestyle. It differs from other shows as it has a more exclusive clientele and many professionals of this world are yearning to come.You will adventure into one of Dubai’s most prestigious shows featuring the latest releases of yachts and boats from both local and international builders together with the innovations in marine equipment and accessories.Discover all its secret gems with Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Discovering Watersports On Terceira
programme.desc: Terceira, on the Azores Islands, is a nautical sporting paradise for many. From pro surfers to passionate sailors, we dive into the lives of local athletes that are fortunate to call this island home.Discovering Watersports On Terceira joins athletes from different categories on their nautical challenges on their way to excellence. However, it also centers on the human aspect, checking on secret spots used by these water enthusiasts as well as lifestyle in the Azores Islands.Join us in their adventure, here on Nautical Channel.

programme.title: Frozen Waterfalls - Icekayaking
programme.desc: [object Object]

programme.title: Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec
programme.desc: Rowing through icy currents in the cold is not for the faint of heart. However, every year competitors jump into their canoes to race in the Ice Canoe Carnival Quebec. The Canoe Race is a legendary competition that has been held since the Carnival's first edition. When the Québec Winter Carnival returned in 1955, ice canoe racing became once again an important annual event, and is now awaited by many in the Canadian city.Each year, several courageous teams compete in extremely freezing conditions a tumultuous ride along the St. Lawrence River between Quebec City and Levis. Find out which team will win against the cold and icy Canadian conditions!

programme.title: Infliction
programme.desc: In 2011, two brothers documented their murder spree in North Carolina. This is the actual assembled footage.

programme.title: Insidious Inferno

programme.title: Beware the Boogeyman
programme.desc: Dr. Tristian Mackenzie makes her way to a Psychiatric Hospital for the criminally insane, where she learns of the strange series of cases from Dr. Moon.

programme.title: Death of A Ghost Hunter
programme.desc: Based on true events, a ghost hunter Carter Simms is paid to conduct a paranormal investigation of a suspected haunted house. Along with a cameraman, a reporter, and a spiritual advocate, she embarks on a three night journey into terror.

programme.title: Wardens - S09:E11 - D4 Salmon
programme.desc: Michigan conservation officers are investigating cases where salmon were caught illegally, like in restricted streams or using banned gear. One officer took the time to show a family the right spots where they can fish legally.

programme.title: Wardens - S09:E12 - Deer Seasons
programme.desc: Michigan Conservation Officers patrol the opening days of deer season for hunting with both archery equipment and firearms; a CO helps remove two deer from an elementary school after they crashed through a window in the dead of night.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E11 - Naturally Distinctive
programme.desc: In this episode we visit places where people haven’t had it easy. Despite the hardships they experience daily, they choose to stay and shape their destiny. Bamiyan – a poverty stricken Afghan province, mercilessly tested by time. Niğde – a Turkish province with striking history. And Patagonia – the rough land at the very end of the world.

programme.title: Miracles of Nature - S02:E12 - Naturally Refreshing
programme.desc: Thailand is one of the few countries in south-east Asia that has never been a European colony. Perhaps the word “thai” which means “free” has something to do with it. It is possibly the reason why this country evokes a certain magic that sets it apart from the surrounding countries. From Thailand we travel to Sri Lanka.

programme.title: The Luxury Travel Show - S01:E03 - St Tropez and St Lucia
programme.desc: In the South of France, 100 kilometres west of Nice, is the famous town of St Tropez. Once a sleepy fishing village, today it is quite possibly the most Jet-Set-Resort in Europe where the rich and famous holiday. Known as the most romantic island in the Caribbean we explore the beauty and everything St Lucia has to offer.

programme.title: The Luxury Travel Show - S01:E04 - Ulagala, Sri Lanka and Florence
programme.desc: Sri Lanka, to the south of Asia, is an idyllic Buddhist island, where cows roam free and ancient monuments and temples can be found almost everywhere. Then it’s off to the busy Italian city of Florence, an art lover’s paradise, where world famous pieces of art can be found hanging in virtually every museum.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E24 - The Queen Her True Story
programme.desc: The story of an extraordinary woman and her incredible life.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E07 - William And Kate Into The Future
programme.desc: From a regular student to a royal girlfriend, Kate Middleton has transformed into a real-life princess. In less than ten years, this everyday girl with a normal background captured her prince's heart and is now on track to become the future Queen of England.

programme.title: Royal Documentaries - S01:E09 - Queen Camilla
programme.desc: The documentary Queen Camilla? takes a closer look at Camilla Parker-Bowles, covering her history, her life, and what lies ahead. It focuses on her long standing ties with Prince Charles. The film also delves into the drama around Camilla's role in Prince Charles's marriage to Princess Diana.

programme.title: Queen of Niendorf
programme.desc: In this celebration of childhood, a 10-year-old girl struggles to find her place in a 'boys' world.

programme.title: Rocket Perelman
programme.desc: In a quest for self-directed living, ten artists near Berlin join forces to start the artist's colony 'Rakete Perelman'. But, they need money.

programme.title: Brother
programme.desc: Lukasz (24) works for a big name in the industry. But after the death of his mother, his little brother Kamil (13) suddenly appears on his doorstep.

programme.title: Who Am I Happy
programme.desc: When Mika enters 15-year-old Alicia life, she is confused by their appearance.

programme.title: Beat Beat Heart
programme.desc: A playful romanticist has been waiting for the love of her life to return – when suddenly her newly separated mother moves in.

programme.title: Lost in the Living
programme.desc: A young Irish musician immerses himself into Berlin nightlife after a concert and loses more than just his friends in the process.

programme.title: In die Welt - Into the World
programme.desc: This moving portrait of a maternity hospital in Vienna provides a fascinating insight into the drama, pain, and beauty of being born into this world.

programme.title: Of Neo-Nazis and Superheroes – How the Far Right is Changing a Small German Town
programme.desc: In the summer of 2017, 6,000 neo-Nazis from all over Europe gathered in Themar for the largest right-wing rock concert of the German post war era.

programme.title: We will survive
programme.desc: At the Julie-Roger-Haus in Frankfurt am Main, a care facility for seniors of all sexual orientations, "grandpa is finally allowed to be gay" (FAZ).

programme.title: Le Ciel, la Terre et L'Homme
programme.desc: The Aït Seghrouchen, a nomadic people from the windswept Moroccan desert, brave sandstorms, watch livestock and the cell phone towers.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: A Shot In The Dark
programme.desc: A baby is kidnapped in a Brazilian airport. Years later, the mother lives in Lisbon and works in a strip-tease bar so she can survive. When she is fired, she joins a gang of bank robbers...

programme.title: Alice and the Vampire Queen
programme.desc: Alice Oldman is an ex-con struggling to overcome the scars from her past. Then one night a dark stranger gives her an offer she cannot refuse. Make one special dish for his boss, the Vampire Queen.

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: A Gun for Jennifer
programme.desc: A woman comes to New York City from Ohio to escape an abusive husband and gets entangled with murderous female vigilantes who prey on abusive men.

programme.title: A Dream Called Death
programme.desc: An introvert and Schizophrenic young man finds the "Perfect Cure" to his mental illness in the form of a damsel whom he considers to be the "Woman of his dream," but his dream somewhat turns out to be a nightmare for him and everyone around him!

programme.title: A Tiger in Winter
programme.desc: On a winter day, when a tiger escapes from the zoo, a man is kicked out of his girlfriend's house. Having no place to go, he wanders from here to there while working as a substitute driver and meets his old girlfriend.

programme.title: Adam and Evelyn
programme.desc: Summer 1989, East Germany. Adam works as a tailor, Evelyn as a waitress. They are planning a vacation together when Evelyn finds out that Adam is cheating on her and decides to leave for the holiday on her own.

programme.title: To The Moon
programme.desc: From Dream To Reality looks back at the people and the technology of the Apollo era.

programme.title: Aurora
programme.desc: Change in the space industry is accelerating.

programme.title: Mani
programme.desc: Dylan, Goth Girl, Hank, and Paige compete to win the Jitterbug empire.

programme.title: Mani
programme.desc: Mani is back! The girls deal with boy drama, while Mani confronts his own theatrics.

programme.title: Mani
programme.desc: Tensions between Sky and Harmony boil over onstage as the school play concludes.

programme.title: Stage Fright
programme.desc: Will Lizzy and Co. be able to unmask the culprit, or will it be curtains for the theater department?

programme.title: Stage Fright
programme.desc: It's dress rehearsal for the Crown Lake drama club, and one student becomes the victim of a tragic accident.

programme.title: Crown Lake
programme.desc: Nellie and Josh hit it off until she learns about long-standing and controversial rule during Treasure Hunt.

programme.title: Crown Lake
programme.desc: After the Scavenger Hunt debacle, Nellie returns to Crown Lake with a vengeance.

programme.title: Total Eclipse
programme.desc: Embarrassed by an old photo, Diana vows to get revenge at her big party.

programme.title: Total Eclipse
programme.desc: When Kate casts a love spell, the girls’ relationships start to change.

programme.title: Chicken Girls
programme.desc: Harmony helps Rhyme make up her mind, and Flash goes out for the team.

programme.title: The Malibu Beach Vampires
programme.desc: In addition to the traditional bloodsuckers, there are other kinds of vampires, you know...such as some politicians, military people, and evangelists.

programme.title: Beach Babe Bingo
programme.desc: The water is cool and the girls are hot, what more could you want? Jump in and go for a swim, then wash up for a fun night out because the beach has nothing but sand and babes.

programme.title: Frank Fearless
programme.desc: An aging reprobate, a rural boy, a large dog and an orphaned baby rhino set out to stop the rhino slaughter. Their quest buffets them between high comedy and searing tragedy, until they end up an inspiration and a conscience to a world in need of heroes.

programme.title: Running Funny
programme.desc: Michael and Eddie are two broke college graduates who rent an “apartment” from Stan, a cantankerous blind war veteran. As they begin their tumultuous transition into the real world, they quickly discover that finding a job will be more complex than securing their degrees.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Is it conceivable that the Doors legendary front man did not die in a bathtub in Paris of an apparent drug overdose?

programme.title: Hot and Sweet
programme.desc: The romantic-comedy tells the story between a pretty boy food truck owner who settles in a spot by the Gangwon beach, and the mysterious and wacky lady he meets.

programme.title: What Do Men Want
programme.desc: A bachelor pad, two struggling actors, Jimmy and Bob, a bunch of women, a love quadrangle, and a secret men's business. It is a coming-of-age story of two 30-something-year-old "kids" looking for meaning and love in all the wrong places.

programme.title: What Do Men Want
programme.desc: A bachelor pad, two struggling actors, Jimmy and Bob, a bunch of women, a love quadrangle, and a secret men's business. It is a coming-of-age story of two 30-something-year-old "kids" looking for meaning and love in all the wrong places.

programme.title: Scratch This
programme.desc: Three self-centered sisters failed attempts to overcome their sibling rivalry results in riotous physical comedy.

programme.title: Scratch This

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with victims of alleged electronic harassment, the supposed use of electronic devices to harass, torture, and/or physically harm a person.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Richard speaks with the pre-eminent investigators of the alleged crash of a UFO near Roswell, New Mexico in 1947.

programme.desc: Obama's birth certificate is a forgery.

programme.title: Conspiracy Show With Richard Syrett
programme.desc: Did the late Stanley Meyer figure out a way to run an internal combustion engine on pure water?

programme.title: Legacy - S03:E12 - Episode 12
programme.desc: Dineo makes a drastic turn in her feud with the Price sisters, shocking even her own lawyer. Petra’s new journey coincides with the arrival of a new senior team member.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E04 - Episode 04
programme.desc: When Andy’s ride-sharing plans are derailed, Stefan steps up and presents a new opportunity for both of them. Lexi is questioned by the police, but the lies and guilt are about to overwhelm her.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E05 - Episode 05
programme.desc: Felicity scrambles to find out why charges against Sefako have been reinstated while Sefako confesses to the murder, and Lexi teeters on the edge.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E06 - Episode 06
programme.desc: Angelique lays a trap for Msizi that someone discovers. A celebratory supper at the Potgieters is interrupted by shocking news.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E07 - Episode 07
programme.desc: After Dineo’s betrayal, the three sisters finally face the consequences of their secrets. As pressure mounts, the sisters’ relationship starts to fracture.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E08 - Episode 08
programme.desc: The Potgieters reel in the wake of the tragedy, and as blame and acrimony begin to swirl, Petra comes to a realisation. Gordon puts his pride on the line to broker the peace between his family.

programme.title: Legacy - S02:E09 - Episode 09
programme.desc: Kedibone’s sixth sense causes Dineo to doubt that the new girl in SJ’s life is telling the truth. Despite an intervention by Stefan, Willem’s guilt and despair drive him deeper into a dark place.

programme.title: Alien Rising
programme.desc: A savvy ex-homeland security agent and martial arts expert is forced to a remote island to help the military unlock the secrets of an extraterrestrial technology.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: Beyond the Night
programme.desc: When a soldier's son reveals damning information about a local gangster's missing daughter, a war of attrition wreaks havoc on their forgotten coal mining town.

programme.title: Beyond
programme.desc: Two brothers runs the neighborhood gang, tries to hide their true identities from their mom by pretending to have a day job, but faces a deeper problems when the ruthless mafia boss asks them to do a job for them. The simple job turns into protecting their homeland against neighboring country's mafia to use their land to expand their dirty business.

programme.title: Long John Silver's Return to Treasure Island
programme.desc: Long John Silver rescues his friend Jim from rival pirates and risks all for hidden treasure in this colorful swashbuckling sequel.

icon.src: https://d1ci3apo8cxilc.cloudfront.net/NYX-STARLIGHT-ENG/videos/posters/LONG JOHN SILVER'S RETURN TO TREASURE ISLAND_1920x1080_EN.png

programme.title: The Steel Claw
programme.desc: A disabled ex-Marine returns to WWII Philippines for a hazardous rescue mission, relying on a steel prosthetic hand and local guerrilla allies.

programme.title: Hell's Angels
programme.desc: Two British brothers fly in WWI’s fiercest battles, face betrayal over a lover, and sacrifice everything amid sky-high spectacle and tragedy.

programme.title: Scarlet Street
programme.desc: A man in mid-life crisis befriends a young woman, though her l fiancé persuades her to con him out of the fortune they mistakenly assume he possesses

programme.title: The Big Trees
programme.desc: A Quaker colony tries to save the giant sequoias from a timber baron

programme.title: A Star is born
programme.desc: A film star helps a young singer and actress find fame, even as age and alcoholism send his own career on a downward spiral

programme.title: Begin With Amen
programme.desc: There are seasons and situations we write off — God could never use that. But Jesus already knew about it when He found you, and He’s got a plan to redeem it. You might be wondering how, because you can’t see it yet. This sermon is an invitation to believe. If you want to know what God can do through your life, follow and find out.

programme.title: This May Be Plan C
programme.desc: What do you do when things don’t go according to plan? There might be some things in your path you didn’t expect, and it might be taking longer than you thought, but God’s got you covered. Watch the message to see why you’re still going to get there.

programme.title: It Still Works
programme.desc: Pastor Steven showed us through the life of Moses how faith often looks like taking action even while you feel full of doubt. God can do miracles when we have the courage to look our doubt in the face and do it anyway.

programme.title: You Can Change The End
programme.desc: You might not be able to change your past, but you can change what happens next. When life feels stuck or uncertain, remember this: the result belongs to God, but your response is still in your hands. You don’t have to control the outcome, just move forward and trust Him with what comes next.

programme.title: Expecting Change
programme.desc: God doesn’t just want to “fix” you, He wants to restore you. Right now, He’s transforming you to impact others. Expect more than a personal breakthrough; expect God to exceed your expectations and bless others through your life.

programme.title: Keep It In Context
programme.desc: When you feel surrounded by pressure and fear, it’s easy to lose perspective. But what if God’s already provided the help you’ve been praying for? Keep it in context: the battle isn’t proof you’re losing, it’s evidence that you’re carrying something worth fighting for.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Guillermo catches up with Cheo and kills him; he is now pointing at Alberto and Lorena – Gunshots are heard in the house. Gertrudis remembers that Alberto was with her and feels like dying thinking something happened to her son. María Bonita suspects that Ricardo is homosexual. Malena provokes Pablo's anger.

programme.title: Corazon Traicionado
programme.desc: Pedro warns Guillermo that the police know it was him who killed Cheo. Lorena, is on the defensive with Omar for trying to "romance" her to get a confession. Carmen makes Virginia see that what the couple proposed to her is "child trafficking". Lorena is surprised by Guillermo, gun in hand, he tells her that he came for her and her son.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Clara Inés reminds Raúl that they can never be together because Pastora's shadow looms over them; Raúl swears he will defend his mother.

programme.title: El Desprecio
programme.desc: Despite his mother's fury, Raul confirms to Pastora that he is still in love with Clara Inés.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: A few days later, Patricia arrives in the country dressed in strict mourning; at the airport, the immigration clerk calls her Mrs. Wilson.

programme.title: Te Tengo en Salsa
programme.desc: Carlos is waiting at Palacios' house when Patricia leaves with Tatiana. Patricia asks what C.R. Perroni is doing at her home and Adriana asks where they know each other from.

programme.title: TODOS PODEMOS VIAJAR
programme.desc: Programa que explora fascinantes destinos turísticos y culturas diversas, ofreciendo recomendaciones y experiencias únicas para los amantes de los viajes.

programme.desc: Programa que explora fascinantes destinos turísticos y culturas diversas, ofreciendo recomendaciones y experiencias únicas para los amantes de los viajes.

programme.title: CONECTADOS
programme.desc: Programa religioso que ofrece enseñanzas y reflexiones sobre la fe.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max piensa que Camila lo rechazó por Roberto. En confesión con el Padre Tiziano, le aconseja que le cuente toda la verdad a Max, pero ella teme que Roberto la denuncie por asesina. Julia y Gregorio vuelven a encontrarse.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila es atropellada por un desconocido que le advierte que deje de buscar a Rosa Blanco. Esto la inquieta y acude a Max pero el le dice que no lo involucre más en este asunto. Todos temen el regreso de Rosa Blanco.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Max y Ezequiel se enfrentan por Camila. Astrid trata de manipular a Roberto para sacarle información a cambio de dinero. Max acusa a Camila de prostituta y decide sacarla de su vida. El regreso de Rosa Blanco es traumático.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: amila y Max visitan en la cárcel a otra Rosa Blanco. La mujer le confirma que tuvo una hija hembra y casi la convence. Max cree que miente para aprovechar la situación.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila insiste en que la mujer presa es su mamá y la Madre Isabel le dice que Rosa Blanco, presa por asesinar a un hombre, no es su madre. El destino entrelaza a las familias en guerra. Buscan identidad de “El Doliente”

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Ezequiel propone reunirse en una cena con Camila para decirle que va a sacar de la carcel a "su mamá". La Madre Isabel sólo quiere que Camila sea feliz y para eso le recomienda que forme una familia.

programme.title: Piel Salvaje
programme.desc: Camila está feliz pués su madre, al fin, está libre, pero Max sigue dudando. Reunidas, quiere saber porqué la abandonó la mujer finge no recordar esos momentos dolorosos. La abandona por segunda vez. Es un golpe muy fuerte.

programme.title: Expediente 53
programme.desc: Esta es una historia de misterio y acción en la ciudad de Bryan Texas el comandante Gatel pide la ayuda del FBI ya que hay muchos desaparecidos, y asesinatos en la ciudad. Los agentes Gutiérrez, Bracho y Miravalle del FBI le comentan al comandante Gatel que ellos sospechan que puede ser obra de una secta satánica y que el líder es un demonio de nombre Abal que está en el cuerpo de una bella mujer de nombre Lilly.

programme.title: 72 Horas Para Morir
programme.desc: Su madre lo dejo en manos de su padre siendo un niño y el lo preparo para ser un gatillero y hacerse cargo del territorio de Texas, por eso lo apodan el Texano. Un día en la calle se encuentra con una mujer y ella le adivina su futuro, le dice que tiene 72 horas para morir... el texano no lo cree pero algo muy malo esta por suceder.

programme.title: Vigilia
programme.desc: Santiago amanece desnudo y golpeado en medio del desierto. El joven se incorpora muy aturdido y retorna a su casa paterna.

programme.title: Borrar de la Memoria
programme.desc: Una historia de amor se transforma en una historia de persecuciones y asesinatos sin esclarecer en el contexto de la masacre estudiantil de octubre de 1968. Más de 40 años después, un periodista tenaz se da a la tarea de aclarar los crímenes bajo condiciones muy peligrosas, con el objetivo de llevar la verdad ante la justicia. Ello representa un esfuerzo dedicado a obligar a un país a reconocer la negación de la reconciliación y el cierre de trágicos acontecimientos políticos y sociales en su historia.

programme.title: Amar
programme.desc: Carlos quiere pero Susana no. Joel no quiere pero Patricia lo obliga. Gabriel lo espera pero Martha no se lo da. Amado lo busca con una gringa y lo pierde. Benito lo tiene toda la vida. Concha se lo lleva más allá del sistema solar. Todos lo quieren y todos lo dan pero unos no lo reciben y otros quieren más. Así es Amar.

programme.title: Expediente 53 3.0
programme.desc: Un extraño ser del más allá regresa con sed de venganza para acabar con todas las personas que lo han estado atormentando por todos estos años, decidiendo poseer a Jack y darle más fuerza a Baal.

programme.title: Abilene Town
programme.desc: Un sheriff intenta detener los conflictos entre colonos en el Oeste tras la Guerra Civil.

programme.title: Detour
programme.desc: El viaje de un autoestopista hacia California se convierte en una pesadilla de muerte, chantaje y encuentros fatales con una despiadada femme fatale.

programme.title: The Man with the Golden Arm
programme.desc: Un exadicto a la heroína intenta reconstruir su vida como baterista de jazz, pero el crimen, la manipulación y la tentación amenazan con arrastrarlo de nuevo a su oscuro pasado.

programme.title: Sherlock Holmes and The Secret Weapon
programme.desc: Holmes debe burlar a espías nazis y a Moriarty para salvar a un inventor de miras de bombardeo.
